safety.title: Your Safety Matters
safety.description: Before you continue, please ensure you are in a safe and private space. This form contains sensitive content. If someone might see your screen, close this page now.
safety.consent: I understand and consent to continue
safety.footer: All reports are anonymous and handled with strict confidentiality.
form.title: Report Incident
form.anonymous: This report is anonymous. No account needed.
step1.title: Incident Details
step1.question: What type of incident?
step1.instruction: Select the category that best describes this incident.
step1.techAbuseInfo: Abuse through phones, apps, social media, tracking, threats, hacking, impersonation, or sharing private content online.
step2.title: Location & Description
step2.question: Where did it happen?
step2.instruction: Provide location and a description of what occurred.
step2.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what happened clearly and objectively. Include relevant context, actions taken on-site, and any witnesses if applicable.
step3.title: Survivor Info
step3.question: Survivor information
step3.instruction: No names or identifying details — fully anonymized.
step3.warning: Do NOT record the survivor's name, ID number, or contact details here.
step4.title: Review & Submit
step4.question: Review & Submit
step4.instruction: Add any extra context, then confirm the details below.
step4.notesPlaceholder: Any additional observations, follow-up actions taken, or other relevant information...
step4.refHint: Create a code you can easily remember — e.g. NT111974 uses initials NT, birth month 11, year 1974.
step4.emailHint: Only provide this if you want a confirmation email. Your identity stays anonymous.
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 30 characters.
validation.selectAge: Please select the survivor's age group.
toast.savedOffline: Saved offline — will sync when you reconnect
toast.error: Failed to submit. Please try again.
success.title: Report Submitted
success.description: Your report has been received securely. Our trained team will review it within 24 hours.
success.refHint: Save this number in case you need to follow up.
success.step1: Your report is reviewed by our counseling team
success.step2: A trained counselor is assigned to the case
success.step4: The incident is escalated if it requires urgent action
success.footer: All reports are handled with strict confidentiality. No identifying information is stored.
